channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA scientist says a 'fifth force' may be hiding in our solar system
item.description: NASA scientist suggests a fifth force could explain cosmic inconsistencies.

item.title: Scientists warn about golden oyster mushrooms sold in Florida markets
item.description: Golden oyster mushrooms spread rapidly in U.S. forests, posing ecological risks.

item.title: Astronomers find strange new type of cosmic explosion
item.description: A mysterious explosion may indicate a new kind of stellar cataclysm.

item.title: 100 million-year-old snake had hind legs and lost bone
item.description: Ancient snake still had hind legs and a cheekbone, altering evolutionary understanding.

item.title: 132 million-year-old dinosaur tracks rewrite history
item.description: Ancient lava flows hid dinosaur tracks now rewriting southern Africa's fossil record.
